sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 32:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 32:1
items.html: During the ascent of Malchut of the Rosh to Yesod of the Rosh only in the form of association, and not in the form of refinement, see answer 73. (Item 6)
